title: Dashboard
body: A single view of cash and spending. In the interactive demo you can add expenses and budgets from here.

title: Expenses
body: Your transactions. In the interactive demo you add from the list and open any row to edit or delete.

title: Add expense
body: Here you add a new expense. In the interactive demo you fill this form and submit.

title: Edit & delete expense
body: Change amount, description, category, or date. In the interactive demo you can Save or Delete from this screen.

title: Budgets
body: Monthly limits and usage. In the interactive demo you add a budget or open one to edit or delete.

title: Add budget
body: Here you create a new budget. In the interactive demo you can submit, then edit or delete it from the budget list.

title: Edit & delete budget
body: Change month, category, or limit. In the interactive demo you can Save or Delete here.

title: Insights
body: Spend forecast and anomaly-style detections from demo data (no API keys).

title: Recommendations
body: Deterministic analysis. In the interactive demo you can run analysis with your sandbox data.

title: Investments
body: Static holdings preview. No live quotes in this sandbox.
